redGreenRefactorEvidence: RED: test_is_cross_merchant_lookup_allows_matching_pair failed — enum compared via str() not .value
GREEN: _capability_value() normalizes TikTokCapability before boundary check
REFACTOR: 16 isolation tests + 52 related TikTok/auth tests pass
implementationSummary: Credential isolation by merchant authorization ID + capability is enforced at repo lookup, credential resolver, and merchant-scoped refresh. Cross-merchant Fujiwa/SANDBOX_VN lookup is rejected; production sync resolves Fujiwa production_read only (no latest-credential fallback). Fixed enum normalization in is_cross_merchant_lookup.
assumptions: Pre-existing schema (008 migration), TikTokCredentialRepo.get_by_merchant, credential_resolver, and refresh_merchant_tokens from prior slices are the integration surface for #297 polling.
Seller-connect OAuth continues to use shop-scoped refresh_tokens; Fujiwa/SANDBOX_VN polling uses refresh_merchant_tokens.
risks: Callers that pass TikTokCapability enum directly to is_cross_merchant_lookup without repo normalization would have failed before this fix — repo paths were already safe.
